header: Drive Reliability | Reliability Engineering, Data Modeling 2025
bullets: Applied MIL-HDBK-217 and related reliability frameworks to model component-level failure rates and evaluate system-level failure modes.

Performed FMEA (MIL-STD-1629) by systematically identifying potential component failure modes, analyzing their causes and effects on overall system performance, and prioritizing risks based on severity, occurrence, and detectability to inform design improvements
Calculated system reliability using reliability block diagrams (RBDs) and leveraged Python to simulate system behavior and perform reliability analysis.
